# Vantage

> AI job preparation tool. Upload your CV, paste a job link, get the full prep pack in ~90 seconds: company intel, tailored cover letter, interview questions + mock drill, CV fit score, and a 5-minute interview pitch.

Vantage is built for people applying to many jobs a week who can't afford to burn two hours researching each company, writing a custom cover letter, and guessing interview questions. One upload, one link, full prep pack.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://vantage-livid.vercel.app/): What Vantage is, how it works, testimonials, pricing overview.
- [Pricing](https://vantage-livid.vercel.app/pricing): Starter £5/$5 = 20 tokens (one-time, never expire). Pro £12/$15 = 60 tokens/month. Premium £20/$25 = 120 tokens/month. One full analysis costs 3 tokens.
- [Register](https://vantage-livid.vercel.app/register): Create a free account to start using Vantage.

## What you get in one analysis

- **Company Intel:** Deep company research — what they do, their tech stack, recent news, culture signals.
- **Tailored Cover Letter:** Four tones to pick from — professional, warm, direct, creative.
- **Mock Interview Questions:** AI-generated likely questions plus an AI-graded mock interview.
- **CV Fit Score:** Match percentage plus the exact gaps to close before the interview.
- **Presentation Outline:** A real 5-minute interview pitch, not a list of bullet points.

## Blog (long-form guides)

- [How to prep for any job interview in 20 minutes](https://vantage-livid.vercel.app/blog/how-to-prep-for-any-interview-in-20-minutes): A concrete 20-minute manual routine used by people applying to 50+ jobs a week. Markdown: /blog/how-to-prep-for-any-interview-in-20-minutes.md
- [What ATS screening software actually checks in 2026](https://vantage-livid.vercel.app/blog/what-ats-actually-checks-in-2026): Plain-English breakdown of how modern applicant tracking systems parse CVs. Markdown: /blog/what-ats-actually-checks-in-2026.md
- [The 4 cover letter tones, and when each one wins](https://vantage-livid.vercel.app/blog/the-4-cover-letter-tones-and-when-to-use-each): When to use Professional vs Warm vs Direct vs Creative, with the rule for picking. Markdown: /blog/the-4-cover-letter-tones-and-when-to-use-each.md
